sandbox.allow-downloads: Lets the sandboxed document start downloads of files.
sandbox.allow-forms: Allows the sandboxed document to submit forms.
sandbox.allow-modals: Lets the sandboxed document open modal dialogs such as alert, confirm, and print.
sandbox.allow-orientation-lock: Allows the sandboxed document to lock screen orientation.
sandbox.allow-pointer-lock: Enables the Pointer Lock API inside the sandboxed document.
sandbox.allow-popups: Allows popups such as window.open() to be created from the sandboxed document.
sandbox.allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox: Allows popups opened from the sandbox to run without the sandbox restrictions.
sandbox.allow-presentation: Grants access to the Presentation API from the sandboxed document.
sandbox.allow-same-origin: Treats the sandboxed content as same-origin with its iframe, reducing isolation.
sandbox.allow-scripts: Allows JavaScript to run inside the sandboxed document.
sandbox.allow-storage-access-by-user-activation: Permits storage access requests after an explicit user gesture.
sandbox.allow-top-navigation: Allows the sandboxed document to navigate the top-level browsing context.
sandbox.allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation: Allows top-level navigation only after a user gesture.
sandbox.allow-top-navigation-to-custom-protocols: Allows top-level navigation to custom URL schemes after a user gesture.
